announcements.headline: Updates
announcements.body: We wish to inform you that IFB Agro Industries Limited ( the Company ) has entered into and executed a Business Transfer Agreement dated May 30, 2025 ( BTA ) with Cargill India Private Limited for acquisition of its entire commercial compound shrimp feed and freshwater fish feed business undertaking in India as a going concern on a slump sale basis in accordance with the terms and conditions of the BTA.Further, we would like to inform you that the Company has completed the formalities for the said acquisition and the Company has made the payment of  total consideration of Rs. 110.00 crs (Rupees One Hundred and Ten Crores), subject to working capital and certain other agreed adjustments in accordance with the terms of the Business Transfer Agreement to Cargill India Private Limited through bank transfer on 31st July, 2025.

announcements.headline: Disclosure of material issue
announcements.body: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, this is to inform that the Board of Directors of IFB Agro Industries Limited at their meeting held on 30th May, 2025, has approved subject to execution of a Business Transfer Agreement to acquire from Cargill India Pvt. Ltd., it entire commercial compound shrimp feed and fresh water fish feed business undertaking in India as a going concern on a slump sale basis.

announcements.headline: Updates
announcements.body: IFB Agro Industries Limited has informed the Exchange regarding ': Intimation for merger of Registrar and Share Transfer Agent (RTA) of the Company with another Company.'.
